eas_text: A civil authority has issued AN IMMEDIATE EVACUATION NOTICE for the following counties or areas: Clark, KS; at 03:36 PM ON MAY 18, 2026 Effective until 06:06 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: Clark County Road P south to Highway 160, County Road 13 to County 16 evacuate immediately to Coldwater to South Central High Gym
